iSpaRo · International Conference on Space Robotics · 2024–2025

iSpaRo Technical Taxonomy Explorer

154 papers · Phylum / Class / Order · citations snapshot 2026-05-09
How Technical and Strict taxonomies differ
Technical

Method-first axis tuned for the iSpaRo dataset. When a paper's title exposes a clearer technical method (e.g. Manipulation, SLAM, Reinforcement Learning), it's routed there instead of being absorbed by a generic Space Robotics bucket.

Top phylum here is Planning · 23.4% — distribution stays balanced across 14 phyla.

Strict

Faithful reproduction of robotics-paper-phylogeny's original classify.py priority rules. Useful for cross-comparing iSpaRo against the canonical T-RO / IJRR / RSS phylogeny site.

For iSpaRo this concentrates ~46% of papers into Application Domains > Space Robotics, since iSpaRo itself is a space-robotics venue.

Both axes share the same Phylum / Class / Order vocabulary inherited from robotics-paper-phylogeny. Underlying paper metadata is sourced from RoboPaper Atlas (DBLP + OpenAlex). Citation counts are a snapshot — updated each build (current: 2026-05-09).
